name: Vapman 10/14/18mm Adapter
summary: Vapman 10/14/18mm Adapter — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Designed to fit 10 mm, 14 mm, and 18 mm joints, this multi-size adapter allows seamless connection to a wide range of water pipes, bubblers, and glass accessories. Precision-engineered from borosilicate glass, this adapter fits securely into the most popular glass joint sizes. Whether users prefer a compact 10 mm bubbler, a standard 14 mm setup, or a larger 18 mm piece, the Vapman adapter ensures a snug and stable fit—eliminating the need for multiple adapters and increasing convenience. Crafted from high-quality, heat-resistant glass, the adapter is both durable and simple to clean. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
